hero.title: Advice, insights, and practical dog care guidance
hero.intro: All blog content is loaded from this JSON file so you can update it easily with a CMS workflow.

posts.title: How Hydrotherapy Can Transform Your Dog's Routine
posts.excerpt: Hydrotherapy can support mobility, confidence, and low-impact conditioning for a wide range of dogs.
content: Hydrotherapy provides an effective low-impact environment for dogs that need mobility support or controlled exercise.
Because water reduces weight-bearing pressure, movement can become more comfortable for dogs recovering from injury or dealing with stiffness.
At K9 Leisure Club, sessions are planned to match your dog's goals, whether that is confidence building, clinical support, or general conditioning.

posts.title: Why Doggy Daycare Beats Staying Home Alone
posts.excerpt: Structured daycare days combine social play, enrichment, and rest for healthier routines.
content: Many dogs thrive when their day includes supervised social activity instead of long periods of isolation.
Daycare provides mental stimulation, movement, and consistent routines that can reduce boredom-related behaviour at home.
A quality daycare plan is not constant excitement; it is balanced, paced, and suited to individual temperament.

posts.title: Grooming Is About More Than Looking Good
posts.excerpt: Professional grooming supports skin comfort, coat condition, and routine hygiene.
content: Regular grooming supports both appearance and practical wellbeing.
De-shedding, bathing, coat trims, and hygiene care all contribute to comfort and healthy skin management.
Choosing a consistent grooming plan can also help spot small changes early, such as sensitivity, matting, or irritation.
